violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. After 10 cycles the maximum surface temperature reached during sanitizing cycle was 155.6?F.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. Test strips for quat sanitizer not available at the time of inspection.
